effects.effect: Discard 1 card from your FP Zone.

effects.name: Primal Winds
effects.effect: After this Vivosaur uses an Attack Skill: you can Charge 1 AIR Vivosaur from your deck into your FP Zone, but you cannot use another Attack Skill for the rest of this turn.

effects.name: Aeros Alert
effects.effect: Apply Excite to the defending Vivosaur.
